content.en:
Lord of Blackwater!

Ye Tian had heard of this Legendary Realm Lord, the Legendary Realm Lord of the Infinite Sea Black Water Mountain, and there was only one such lord in the Black Water Mountain, but the strength of the Black Water Lord was very strong, and it could be called the top among the ordinary Legendary Realm Lords.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, the other party has at least mastered the supreme skill, and there is more than one skill, otherwise he would not have such a great reputation.

Therefore, even if there is only one Legendary Realm Lord in Blackwater Mountain, his reputation is greater than that of the Tricky Star Tower, after all, the Tricky Star Lord is really not very powerful, not as good as the Blackwater Lord.

If you want to kill the Lord of the Black Water, at least the kind that can be called invincible among the ordinary Legendary Realm Lords, or directly the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, otherwise you can't kill him at all.

"Lord Mofeng actually said that the Lord of Blackwater is a traitor, could it be that Lord Blackwater was once a member of Moshan?"

Ye Tian really didn't know about this news

But if this is the case, why did the Lord of Blackwater defect to Moshan?

"Maybe it's for some kind of treasure. "

Ye Tian guessed.

The Lord of Mofeng asked the comer to avenge Moshan.Naturally, there is no constraint, of course, if you accept the treasure of Moshan, if you attack the eternal master in the future and want to erase the cause and effect, maybe you will really do it.

It is too difficult to restrain the Legendary Realm Lord, and the Mofeng Lord is about to fall, so naturally there is no means to restrain the Legendary Realm Lord in the future, so he only left this sentence.

Ye Tian didn't think too much about it, he came directly to the treasure house here, that is, behind the Lord of Mofeng.

The door of the treasure house is open, and the treasures inside can be clearly seen.

Eternal Arcana, 129 pieces

There are countless materials.

Ye Tian saw countless resources, many of which were resources to enhance the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules, this was the foundation of a top force.

Last time, although Ye Tian obtained the treasure of the Yang Lie Lord, it was still nothing compared to here

The resources here are the real big gains

With so many resources, Ye Tian's cultivation to the peak of the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord could be shortened for a long time.

"There are so many eternal treasures that can be left to the human race as a foundation in the future."

Ye Tian muttered.

And among these eternal treasures, there are also three median eternal treasures.

A piece of armor, a sword, and a bead.

I have to say that these three Median Eternal Treasures are all suitable for Ye Tian and can enhance his strength.

"Yes, these three Median Eternal Treasures alone can be regarded as a great harvest

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

It's a pity that even Moshan doesn't have a top-level Eternal Treasure, and the top-level Eternal Treasure is even needed by the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

In this treasure room, there is also a inheritance message, which is floating in the void.

"It should be left behind by Lord Mofeng.

Ye Tian accepted this inheritance information.

Suddenly, the phantom of a treasure appeared.

It was a treasure made up of scales, shaped like a monster, and these scales contained a variety of abilities, full of endless mysteries.

At this time, the information about this treasure was also known to Ye Tian.

"Kite. "

This is the name of this treasure, also known as the Three Thousand Iris, with 3,000 scales, each of which contains a special ability, some of which can enhance the mind, some can deduce secret techniques, some can assist in the time of enlightenment, some can assist in the space of enlightenment, and some even help to merge time and space.

Three thousand kites, the true treasure of Moshan, are also the reason why the Lord of Blackwater stole this treasure and defected to Moshan.

And.

The three thousand iris can also assist in the battle, and the three legendary realm lords of Mo 1l all broke through to the legendary realm lords with the help of these three thousand iris, and the same is true for Heishui.

Originally, Moshan was going to rely on this treasure to cultivate more Legendary Realm Lords, but as a result, Heishui defected, took this treasure with him, and hid it for countless years.

One day in the future, the strength of the Black Water Lord will increase greatly, and many Legendary Realm Lords will unite to besiege and kill the three Legendary Realm Lords of Moshan.

In the first battle, the two Legendary Realm Lords fell, and the Mofeng Lords were severely injured and dying, but they also fell soon after

It can be said that the Black Water Lord has become so powerful, and the three thousand iris must have a credit.

"Heishui Mountain has only one Legendary Realm Lord so far, I'm afraid that the Black Water Lord will never give the legendary lord of Heishui Mountain enlightenment, otherwise Heishui Mountain is afraid that many Legendary Realm Lords will be born," Ye Tian guessed.

He also guessed why the Lord of Blackwater didn't let the people of Heishui Mountain come to enlightenment, and he was also afraid that Heishui Mountain would give birth to a legendary realm lord like him, so he would steal three thousand iris and repeat the fate of Moshan.

"'The Lord of the Ink Peak exposed this matter, and he was afraid that I would not avenge him, there is a treasure of three thousand kites, except for the peak Legendary Realm Lord like the white-bearded old man, the other Legendary Realm Lords will be moved. "

Ye Tian muttered.

As for why the Lord of Mofeng didn't publicize it, let countless Legendary Realm Lords know.

There is only one reason, and that is to say it, and others don't believe it!

Otherwise, now casually spread rumors, saying that a certain Legendary Realm Lord has a treasure against the sky, and if he takes it away, he can cultivate a large number of Legendary Realms, who would believe it?

Moreover, Heishui Mountain is a legendary realm lord, and if he tells the truth, others will not deal with the blackwater lord

After all, this kind of rumor-mongering thing, the Void Region has not done less, which Legendary Realm Lord has not been rumor-mongered?

It's just that now those peak Legendary Realm lords, no one dares to spread rumors.

"Lord Mofeng wants people to take revenge, and the inheritance information he left behind may be true or false. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But there is a great possibility that it is true, and if it is true, it is indeed a great opportunity.

"If you have the opportunity in the future, you can kill him. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took away all these resources, and then buried the body of Lord Mofeng here.

Even if a Legendary Realm Lord accidentally discovers this place in the future, and sees that there is nothing here, it will not destroy this place.

Even!

Ye Tian walked out of the Moshan prison, and he was still in a good mood.

It's just a hang out, and you get so much good ugliness, there are not many opportunities like this!

I have to say that his luck is quite good.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used some of the resources he had just obtained to continuously improve his will rule heaven and earth, refining his supreme legendary body, and his strength progress was many times faster than in the past. _
